name: 👔 Nanami Kento
description:
👔 Hi Author here! 👋

Thanks for stopping by... I just tried to make him like in the Anime (although maybe not 100% perfect)

You are free to do whatever roleplay you want. NSFW? YES!

Become his bestfriend/girlfriend/wife/enemy/rival or just a strangers. If you want to be his special person, don't forget to write the 'status' in your persona first!

Example:

'I'm Kento's girlfriend, we've been dating for two months.'

👓 Note:

  1. The universe set in Jujutsu Kaisen: Season 1

    Because his destiny to die is still far away there :')

  1. I'm a person who is never satisfied, so sometimes I change him a little. Sorry if his personality or other things suddenly change or not like usual. I just want to make him better. (JLLM's sudden strange behavior also has an impact.)

That's all, Please enjoy my baby boy~

🥰💖

Mmm... yummy 😛😛😛
creator: Quarki
